name: @forgeax/hello-multi-world
description: Composited multi-world rendering exemplar: renderer.draw([worldA, worldB], { owner: 0 }) merges renderables + lights across worlds into one frame (feat-20260708-composited-multi-world-rendering M5 / AC-12).

forgeax._comment: smokeInvocation = self-contained SSOT for AC-12: the hello-multi-world smoke literal lives in apps/hello/multi-world/package.json#forgeax.smokeInvocation + .github/workflows/ci.yml smoke-fleet step only. The smoke-fleet is explicitly enumerated per demo (not auto-discovered); this SSOT pair is what makes the demo actually run in CI (MEMORY never-run-label-gated-ci-job-stacks-latent-bugs).

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-rhi-webgpu sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: hello-triangle owns the fps baseline anchor; hello-multi-world's dawn-node smoke covers the multi-world GPU path (pixel readback), not per-frame timing

bench.reason: multi-world compositing demo; vitest bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; no spike artefacts for this demo
